content.text:
{"success":true,"response":"I have successfully completed all steps of process J09B:

1. ✅ Created J09B_temp table from decision_table with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the temporary table
3. ✅ Applied all rules (KSA/EVU based on EQUNR count, HOUSE_NUM1 ranges, and address areas)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table using ANLAGE/Installation
5. ✅ Joined with net_master and sales_master tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Compared sales and net data - kept sales data when available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for EQUNRs with both 2023 and 2024 records where ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"
8. ✅ Exported MANDATORY_READING entries (792 rows) to J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv
9. ✅ Sent MANDATORY_READING file to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. ✅ Exported non-MANDATORY_READING entries (19,388 rows) to J09B.csv
11. ✅ Sent J09B file to meter.readings@evu.com
12. ✅ Deleted the temporary table J09B_temp

The process has been completed successfully.","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
I have successfully completed all steps of process J09B:

1. ✅ Created J09B_temp table from decision_table with TOUR starting with J09B
2. ✅ Added ENTSCHEIDUNG column to the temporary table
3. ✅ Applied all rules (KSA/EVU based on EQUNR count, HOUSE_NUM1 ranges, and address areas)
4. ✅ Joined with eablg table using ANLAGE/Installation
5. ✅ Joined with net_master and sales_master tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Compared sales and net data - kept sales data when available, otherwise net data
7. ✅ Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for EQUNRs with both 2023 and 2024 records where ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"
8. ✅ Exported MANDATORY_READING entries (792 rows) to J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv
9. ✅ Sent MANDATORY_READING file to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. ✅ Exported non-MANDATORY_READING entries (19,388 rows) to J09B.csv
11. ✅ Sent J09B file to meter.readings@evu.com
12. ✅ Deleted the temporary table J09B_temp

The process has been completed successfully.

kwargs.content: The process rule with ID 'J09B' has been successfully executed. All steps were completed, including data processing, decision logic application, file exports, and email notifications. The temporary table was also cleaned up after completion.
